meta.intent: Teach valid group taps, dock clears, rescue extraction, and that water is now part of every real board.
meta.expectedPath: Clear the lower-center A and B columns to open the lane around the puppy, then take the top A pair to finish the rescue before the second rise matters.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player chases the easy side triples first, stuffs the dock with mismatched pieces, and walks into Dock Jam instead of finishing the rescue lane.
meta.whatItProves: The game can deliver 'save the puppy' before it reads as abstract clearing.
meta.notes: The center route is intentionally cleaner than the side-value clears so the first rescue lands fast when the player commits to it.
